title: How to build Gantt in one horizontal line?
excerpt: Im using Gantt on Excel, since I cant find any way to have a gantt per project in one line. So I can have 20 different project`s Gantts in one dashboard and see where the stages has crossover. Is there a way to do that? …

posts.author: Natalya.p (Natalya Polishchuk)
posts.cookedHtml: Im using Gantt on Excel, since I cant find any way to have a gantt per project in one line. So I can have 20 different project`s Gantts in one dashboard and see where the stages has crossover. Is there a way to do that? Thanks
